mapper.select: SELECT s.salary_id, s.member_id, m.name, m.department, m.position, COALESCE(sg.base_salary, 0) AS base_salary, s.pay_year, s.pay_month, s.created_at FROM salary s JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN salary_grade sg ON m.position = sg.position ORDER BY s.pay_year DESC, s.pay_month DESC, m.name

SELECT s.salary_id, s.member_id, m.name, m.department, m.position, COALESCE(sg.base_salary, 0) AS base_salary, s.pay_year, s.pay_month, s.created_at FROM salary s JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN salary_grade sg ON m.position = sg.position WHERE s.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY s.pay_year DESC, s.pay_month DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary (member_id, base_salary, pay_year, pay_month) VALUES (#{memberId}, (SELECT base_salary FROM salary_grade WHERE position = (SELECT position FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId})), #{payYear}, #{payMonth})
